items.title: The term "AGI" has aged very poorly.
items.description: The term "AGI" has aged very poorly. AI can't possibly me more different from human intelligence. It's *far better* than human intelligence, for most economically-relevant tasks. But that doesn't make AIs better than humanity. There are wo…
items.description_zh: “AGI”这个术语已经过时了。人工智能与人类智能截然不同。对于大多数与经济相关的任务来说，它比人类智能“好得多”。但这并不意味着人工智能比人类更好。有我…
